title: elymus elongatus subsp. flaccidifolius
intro: Elymus elongatus subsp. flaccidifolius, also known as blue wildrye or flaccid-leaved elymus, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Elymus elongatus subsp. flaccidifolius include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
